description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:testing Docker image. Add a build job in the build stage that caches src/*.o, runs "apt update && apt -y install make autoconf automake libtool check lcov cppcheck python3 pkgconf", then executes "autoreconf -i && ./configure --disable-pylint && make", and publishes the directories super and superdb as artifacts. Add a test job in the test stage that runs "apt update && apt -y install make autoconf automake libtool check lcov cppcheck pkgconf clang-tools-4.0 clang python3 python3-pip python3-numpy python3-scipy python3-biopython python3-pyparsing pylint", then "pip3 install -U ProDy", followed by "autoreconf -i && ./configure --enable-code-coverage", then "scan-build make", "make check", and finally "make local-code-coverage-output". No special rules, only/except, or deployment targets are defined.
